title: Bit Digital Reports 141% Revenue Growth Driven by HPC Expansion
text: Bit Digital announced fiscal year 2024 financial results showing remarkable growth, with total revenue reaching $108.1 million, up significantly from the prior year. The company's business transformation is evident in its revenue composition with Bitcoin mining at $58.6 million representing a 32% increase year-over-year, Cloud services at $45.7 million as a new business line, ETH staking at $1.8 million representing a 169% increase, and Colocation services at $1.4 million. Cloud services revenue generating 42% of total 2024 revenue represents a major strategic shift from the company's historical mining focus. The company maintained strong financial health with $260.7 million in total liquidity and zero debt. Adjusted EBITDA reached $73.0 million, compared to $12.4 million the previous year, while earnings per share improved to $0.19 from a loss of $0.16. A significant milestone was the October 2024 acquisition of Enovum Data Centers for approximately $46 million USD, which provided infrastructure capabilities and operational expertise. The company also secured major cloud service contracts, including a potential $700 million revenue opportunity over the five-year term with Boosteroid. On announcement day, BTBT stock gained 7.49%, reflecting positive investor sentiment toward the diversification strategy and strong financial performance.
